ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "store_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Current status of the store (e.g., open, closed, under renovation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code or SKU of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping and handling */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "product_warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "log_quantity" REAL /* Logarithmic quantity (for statistical analysis) */,
  "advertising" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product was advertised */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of sale */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, debit card) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "return_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sale was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "minimum_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "maximum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last physical stock check */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current status of the stock (e.g., in stock, out of stock, low stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "manufacturer_established_date" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "employee_role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., store manager, inventory clerk, data analyst) */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email of the employee */,
  "employee_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "employee_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "employee_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_employee_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "customer_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
